source.title: Heimao (Black Cat) Complaints Platform - Pinduoduo Data 2024-2025

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo 2024 annual Heimao complaint volume was 119,036, ranking #1 among e-commerce platforms
extractions.evidence: 2024年拼多多黑猫投诉量为119,036件，位列电商行业榜首。拼多多投诉回复率仅为15.07%，远低于京东的99%。

verification.verifier_notes: From Heimao 2024 annual e-commerce complaints report. Cross-referenced with multiple sources.

extractions.claim: 2025 full-year e-commerce complaints on Heimao totaled 1,673,402, up 30.73% YoY from 2024's 1.28M
extractions.evidence: 2025年黑猫投诉平台共收到电商相关投诉1,673,402单，较2024年上涨30.73%。抖音、淘宝（含天猫）、拼多多等几大电商平台投诉占2025年电商领域总投诉量的84.2%。

verification.verifier_notes: From Heimao 2025 annual comprehensive e-commerce complaint report

extractions.claim: Top e-commerce complaint themes (2025): customer service attitude (40%+), product quality/mismatch (22%), refund difficulties, non-shipment, false advertising
extractions.evidence: 2025年全年电商领域投诉中，客服态度问题占比最高，超过40%，其次是商品质量差与货不对板问题，占比约22%，退款困难、不发货、虚假宣传等问题分列三、四、五位。

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo complaint reply rate was only 20% in 2024 vs JD 99%, Taobao only 5%
extractions.evidence: 头部投诉商家中，拼多多回复了20%的投诉，淘宝（含天猫）只回复了5%的投诉，其余商家处理良好。

verification.verifier_notes: From Heimao 2024 annual report. Note: two sources cite slightly different reply rates (15% vs 20%) for PDD.

extractions.claim: Complaint velocity: 2025 monthly peak was May at 173,804 (up 21% MoM), December was 134,798. Peaks correlate with 618 and Double 11 promotions.
extractions.evidence: 2025年5月电商平台有效投诉总量为173,804单，相比4月增长21%，受6·18预热活动影响。12月为134,798单。投诉量前三的商家为抖音、拼多多和淘宝。

verification.verifier_notes: From Heimao monthly reports for May and December 2025

extractions.claim: Counterfeit goods complaints account for ~59% of Pinduoduo's Heimao complaints (as of March 2025)
extractions.evidence: 截止撰稿时，共有22,512条关于假货的投诉，占到了拼多多在该平台的总投诉量（38,274条）的约59%。

verification.verifier_notes: This figure may reference a specific time window rather than cumulative total. Source: news.qq.com article on PDD earnings.
